programmes.show_description: Bruno Brookes with the soundtrack of a decade - literally - the biggest UK movie songs of the '80s. Expect Rocky, Flashdance, Dirty Dancing, Top Gun and Ghostbusters!
Lesser known songs you may have forgotten from artists you'll certainly know!
You may remember the artists, but do you recall their lesser heard songs? With Tears Fears, Freddie Mercury & Level 42.
60 minutes of back to back UK chart runners-up from 1985 - a year of Prince, King and Queen Madonna's big breakthrough! With Mr Charts himself, Mark Goodier.
Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights and iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made 1985!

programmes.show_name: So Awful, Yet So Amazing! Top 20
programmes.show_description: Twenty songs and videos from the '80s that some would think are pretty awful, but we think are just magnificent - in their own way! Please leave credibility shoes at the door.
We'd rather jack than Fleetwood Mac! A whole day of 80s celebrities & singalongs, Including Rick Astley, Jason Donovan, Brother Beyond & Bucks Fizz.
Every song is fun, fabulous and feelgood! We challenge you not to pick up that hairbrush and sing your heart out with this ultimate 80s mixtape.
We'd rather jack than Fleetwood Mac! A whole day of 80s celebrities & singalongs, Including Rick Astley, Jason Donovan, Brother Beyond & Bucks Fizz.
100 minutes of everyone Sinitta fancied being, or just plain adored in the '80s. Her favourite boys and gorgeous girls in their fiercest videos - you'll fancy them a little bit too!
We'd rather jack than Fleetwood Mac! A whole day of 80s celebrities & singalongs, Including Rick Astley, Jason Donovan, Brother Beyond & Bucks Fizz.

programmes.show_name: Did They Think They Could Dance?!
programmes.show_description: From 1980 to 1989, videos full of self belief - but have their moves stood the test of time? You decide as we bring you 30 clips of dodgy dance and suspect swaying from the '80s!
'80s TV funnymen Trev & Simon are the perfect hosts to get you in the mood to party, swing some pants and have a giggle about some of the top pop talent of the decade!
Through the decade, 40 hit songs from famous acts of the '80s - but not a single one made the top 10! Not everything went right for the A-List!
Denise, Julie and Steve with over two hours of salty videos full of sea, sun and sand! Time to get beach fit with Tight Fit and NOW 80s!
Trying to impress someone with your cool moves? Give these a go, as we party into the night on NOW 80s.
Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights & iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made 1982!
Sixty minutes of back to back UK chart runners-up from 1982 - including forgotten hits from Trio and Chas & Dave. With Mr Charts himself, Mark Goodier.
Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights & iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made 1982!

programmes.show_name: Most Weeks in UK Chart? Top 100
programmes.show_description: Who spent the most weeks in the UK top 75 during the whole decade? We countdown the top 100 artists with longevity - all their song weeks combined, and surprises are a guarantee!
You may remember the artists, but do you recall their lesser heard songs? With Blancmange, Elton John, Ultravox, Malcolm McClaren & Bananarama.
1984 was huge for singles, with the decade's four biggest sellers all releasing that year. Bruno Brookes celebrates electro, Hi-NRG and rap all becoming vital ingredients in pop!
In 1984, with MTV in full swing, music videos were a thrilling blend of creativity & innovation with artists like Prince, Madonna & Michael Jackson.
Month by month, Bruno Brookes plays 12 lesser known hits of 1984! Including Alison Moyet, Human League and UB40, plus forgotten acts like Alphaville and the Kane Gang.
In 1984, with MTV in full swing, music videos were a thrilling blend of creativity & innovation with artists like Prince, Madonna & Michael Jackson.
10 artists that had a single big song in 1984 - then never darkened the UK Top 20 ever again! Remember John Waite, Matthew Wilder, Alphaville and Fiction Factory?
In 1984, with MTV in full swing, music videos were a thrilling blend of creativity & innovation with artists like Prince, Madonna & Michael Jackson.
NOW 3 featured plenty of smash hits, but also plenty of long forgotten songs from the likes of Blancmange, David Sylvian and The Art Company. Every video we could find is here!
